# Project Buildup History: Real-Time Sales Signal Dashboard

- Repository: `realtime-sales-signal-dashboard`
- Category: `ops_platform`
- Subtype: `generic`
- Source: `project_buildup_2021_2025_daily_plan.csv`
## 2024-04-08 - Day 1: Problem discovery start

- Task summary: Started this one by sitting down and trying to understand what Real-Time Sales Signal Dashboard should actually become. I did not rush into code yet. The main thing here was to write down the operational problem Real-Time Sales Signal Dashboard is meant to solve and who feels the pain so the project had a decent base. This was still the messy setup part where I was opening files, checking examples, and trying not to overthink it too early. This kind of project only works if the logic feels practical, so I spent time checking the flow again and again.
- Deliverable: By the end of the day I had problem brief written down in a rough way, which was enough to stop guessing and move into the next step. There were still a couple of loose parts, but nothing serious enough to block the next step.
